revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23985667504|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:東白鬚公園]]
{{Primary sources|date=March 2020}} {{Infobox park | name = Higashi Shirahige Park | image = [[File:Higashi shirahige park.JPG|Higashi shirahige park|300px]] | caption = South Gate (2015/9/16) | country = {{JPN}} | location = [[:en:Sumida City|Sumida City]], {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|qid=Q1490|lt=Tokyo|1=Tokyo}}, Japan | lat_deg = 35 | lat_min = 43 | lat_sec = 57 | N/S = N | long_deg = 139 | long_min = 48 | long_sec = 50 | E/W = E | map = Japan Tokyo | type = [[Metropolitan park]] | area = 10.3 ha | established = June 1, 1986 ({{ill|Shōwa era|en|Shōwa era|qid=Q327567|lt=Shōwa|1=Shōwa era}} 61) | operator = | visitors = | status = Open | facilities = | parking = | accessibility = | architect = | awards = | office = Higashi Shirahige Park Service Center | office_location = 2-2-1 Tsutsumi-dōri, Sumida City, Tokyo | publictransit = {{ill|Tobu Skytree Line|en|Tobu Skytree Line|qid=Q13360900|lt=Tobu Skytree Line|1=Tobu Skytree Line}} {{ill|Kanezuka Station|en|鐘ヶ淵駅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanezuka Station|qq=}}, 7-minute walk | website = [https://www.tokyo-park.or.jp/park/format/index012.html Higashi Shirahige Park] }} '''Higashi Shirahige Park''' (東白鬚公園) is a Tokyo Metropolitan park located in Tsutsumi-dōri, [[:en:Sumida City|Sumida City]], {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|qid=Q1490|lt=Tokyo|1=Tokyo}}, Japan. It stretches in a narrow north-south alignment along the {{ill|Sumida River|en|Sumida River|qid=Q222149|lt=Sumida River|1=Sumida River}}.
== Disaster Prevention Facilities == Higashi Shirahige Park is designated as a [[Kōtō Area]] {{ill|Wide-Area Evacuation Site|ja|広域避難場所|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wide-Area Evacuation Site|1=Wide-Area Evacuation Site|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11484343}} and is equipped with disaster prevention facilities<ref name="Top_Shirahige">{{Cite web|ja|url=http://tokyo-eastpark.com/modules/Top_Shirahige/ |title=東白鬚公園 |accessdate=2015-09-15 |website=Tokyo East Parks |archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20160305195402/http://tokyo-eastpark.com/modules/Top_Shirahige/ |archivedate=2016-03-05 |url-status=dead|url-status-date=2020-03-24}}</ref>.
The park is surrounded by residential areas and the Sumida River, designed to provide a firebreak for protecting residential zones in the event of large-scale fires. Its disaster prevention role was established through the {{ill|Shirahige East Urban Redevelopment Project|ja|白鬚東地区第一種市街地再開発事業|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shirahige East Urban Redevelopment Project|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}<ref>{{Cite web|ja|url=https://www.toshiseibi.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/dainiseibi/tikubetu/shahige_higashi/index.html |title=白鬚東地区 |accessdate=2016-01-08 |website=Tokyo Metropolitan Bureau of Urban Development}}</ref>.
Across the Sumida River, [[Shirahige Nishi Urban Redevelopment Project|Shirahige West]] houses another Wide-Area Evacuation Site in [[Shioiri Park]], which is connected to Higashi Shirahige Park via the [[Suijin Bridge]]<ref>{{Cite web|ja|url=https://www.toshiseibi.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/dainiseibi/tikubetu/shirahige_nishi/index.html |title=白鬚西地区 |accessdate=2016-01-08 |website=Tokyo Metropolitan Bureau of Urban Development}}</ref>.
Other disaster prevention facilities in the Shirahige East area include: * [[Tokyo Metropolitan Rehabilitation Hospital]] – designated for disaster medical care. * Shirahige East Apartments (Shirahige Disaster Prevention Housing Complex) – designed with deformable structures to act as large-scale firewalls during emergencies<ref name="Top_Shirahige" />.
== Facilities == According to the official website<ref name="Top_Shirahige" />: * '''Service Center''': Manages and operates park facilities. ** Hours: 8:30 AM – 5:30 PM ** Address: 2-2-1 Tsutsumi-dōri, Sumida City, Tokyo * '''Symbol Tower''': An installation modeled after traditional firemen's standards (纏, matoi) from the {{ill|Edo period|en|Edo period|qid=Q184963|lt=Edo period|1=Edo period}}. * '''Tennis Courts''': Four all-weather courts. * '''Small Baseball Fields''': Two fields.
== Nearby Facilities == * [[Tokyo Metropolitan Sewerage Bureau]] facilities * [[Sumida City Sakurazutsumi Junior High School]] * [[Umewaka Bridge Community Hall]] * [[Silver Plaza Umewaka]] * [[Kibōji Temple]] * [[Sumida River Shrine]]
== Access == * {{ill|Tobu Skytree Line|en|Tobu Skytree Line|qid=Q13360900|lt=Tobu Skytree Line|1=Tobu Skytree Line}} ** 7-minute walk from [[Kanezuka Station|Kanezuka Station]]<ref name="Top_Shirahige" /> * Sumida City Loop Bus "Sumida Hyakkei Sumimaru-kun/Sumirin-chan" – Northwest route (Caution: One-way loop service). ** Stops: "Silver Plaza Umewaka," "Sumida River Shrine/Kibōji Entrance," "Enomoto Takeaki Statue Entrance."
== Notes == {{Reflist}}
== Related Articles == * [[Tokyo Metropolitan Rehabilitation Hospital]] * [[Suijin Bridge]] * [[Shioiri Park]] * {{ill|Ōjima Komatsugawa Park|en|Ōjima Komatsugawa Park|qid=Q6629688|lt=Ōjima Komatsugawa Park|1=Ōjima Komatsugawa Park}} – another disaster prevention park developed during the same period.
== External Links == * [https://www.tokyo-park.or.jp/park/format/index012.html Higashi Shirahige Park] – Official website (Tokyo Metropolitan Park Association). * {{Twitter|ParksHigashishi|Higashi Shirahige Park}}
{{Tokyo-park-stub}} {{Tokyo Metropolitan Parks}}
